---
title: "SaveskiEtAl Data Loading"
format: html
---


```{r}
#| warning: false
# use rix at some point: https://github.com/ropensci/rix

options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

if (!requireNamespace("groundhog", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("groundhog")
}

pkgs <- c("data.table", "jsonlite")

groundhog::groundhog.library(pkg = pkgs,
                             date = "2025-01-01") # R-4.4.1

rm(pkgs)
```

## Load SaveskiEtAl News Conversations

```{r}
# Define data path
data_path <- "../data/SaveskiEtAl/jsons_no_embs/news"

# Get list of all gzipped JSON files
json_files <- list.files(data_path, pattern = "\\.json\\.gz$", full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Function to extract tweets and metadata from a single conversation file
read_conversation <- function(file_path) {
  tryCatch({
    data <- fromJSON(gzfile(file_path))

    # Extract tweets data
    tweets_list <- data$tweets
    tweet_ids <- names(tweets_list)

    # Build tweets data.table
    tweets_dt <- data.table(
      tweet_id = tweet_ids,
      user_id = sapply(tweets_list, function(x) x$user_id),
      time = sapply(tweets_list, function(x) x$time)
    )

    # Add toxicity scores
    toxicity_scores <- data$toxicity_scores
    if (!is.null(toxicity_scores)) {
      toxicity_dt <- data.table(
        tweet_id = names(toxicity_scores),
        toxicity_score = unlist(toxicity_scores)
      )
      tweets_dt <- merge(tweets_dt, toxicity_dt, by = "tweet_id", all.x = TRUE)
    }

    # Add alignment scores (user-level)
    alignment_scores <- data$alignment_scores
    if (!is.null(alignment_scores)) {
      alignment_dt <- data.table(
        user_id = names(alignment_scores),
        alignment_score = unlist(alignment_scores)
      )
      tweets_dt <- merge(tweets_dt, alignment_dt, by = "user_id", all.x = TRUE)
    }

    # Add conversation-level metadata
    tweets_dt[, `:=`(
      root_tweet_type = data$root_tweet_type,
      conversation_file = basename(file_path)
    )]

    return(tweets_dt)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error reading", file_path, ":", e$message, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Read all conversation files
all_tweets <- rbindlist(
  lapply(json_files[1:10], read_conversation),
  fill = TRUE
)

cat("Loaded", nrow(all_tweets), "tweets from", length(json_files), "conversations\n")
```

```{r}
# Quick summary
head(all_tweets)
str(all_tweets)
summary(all_tweets[, .(time, toxicity_score, alignment_score)])
```

## Key Statistics

```{r}
# Tweets per conversation
tweets_per_conv <- all_tweets[, .N, by = conversation_file]
cat("Mean tweets per conversation:", round(mean(tweets_per_conv$N), 2), "\n")
cat("Median tweets per conversation:", median(tweets_per_conv$N), "\n")
cat("Max tweets in a conversation:", max(tweets_per_conv$N), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Toxicity statistics
all_tweets[, .(
  mean_toxicity = mean(toxicity_score, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_toxicity = median(toxicity_score, na.rm = TRUE),
  n_toxic = sum(toxicity_score > 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
  pct_toxic = round(100 * sum(toxicity_score > 0.5, na.rm = TRUE) / .N, 2)
)]
```

```{r}
# Alignment statistics
all_tweets[!is.na(alignment_score), .(
  mean_alignment = mean(alignment_score),
  sd_alignment = sd(alignment_score),
  n_users = uniqueN(user_id)
)]
```
